case_title: HALL MICHAEL C. VS HIBBITTS MICHAEL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HIBBITTS MICHAEL
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23359, RECORD TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY HALL MICHAEL C. AS TO DEFENDANT HIBBITTS MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL MICHAEL C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIBBITTS MICHAEL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL MICHAEL C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HIBBITTS MICHAEL JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23359 ON 9-28-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
